title: Add automatic apparmor tag discovery
body:
The 'apparmor' build tag is now added if libappamor was found on the
local system.

comments.body:
Hm, is this code not executed at all?
https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/ac5031de808b694863ac51319b77bf6e63eea845/chroot/run.go#L862-L871

Fair enough. If a user wants to force-set a profile, this would work. How ever I didn't notice that when grepping. Thanks!

LGTM :+1:
